children.text: To share a document or chat with others, you must verify your email address.

To share a document or chat with others, you must verify your email address.
Use Import Contact List to import the contacts from your device to create your own address book in Polaris Office.
Add contacts in Polaris Office Contacts
Import contacts to create your own address book in Polaris Office.
You can add contacts after verifying your email address.
